response:
It looks like this session genuinely has no file-editing tools available (no Read/Write/Edit/Bash/Glob/Grep) — only ReportFindings, ScheduleWakeup, ToolSearch, Workflow, plus Cron/Monitor/DesignSync/Worktree/PushNotification/RemoteTrigger, none of which can write files to your repo. I can't create the skill files in this environment as-is.

A couple of options: I could run this through the Workflow tool (it spawns subagents that do have full file access), but per my instructions that requires your explicit opt-in (e.g. saying "use a workflow" or "ultracode"). Would you like me to do that, or is there a different session/interface where standard file tools are enabled?
